Title: Advisor Loads Overview Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a logged-in advisor can open the Advisor dashboard (Overview).
Prerequisites: Logged in as an approved, active Advisor.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as Advisor.
2. Navigate to the Advisor Dashboard.
Expected Results: The Overview loads with 4 KPI cards (Remaining Balance, Total Collected, Total Expenses, Collectable Org Fee) and the student list below.
Actual Results: The Overview loads with 4 KPI cards (Remaining Balance, Total Collected, Total Expenses, Collectable Org Fee) and the student list below.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the Advisor Overview renders for an Advisor. Fail if it does not load for an Advisor.

Title: Unauthenticated Blocked from Advisor Dashboard
Objectives: Verify an unauthenticated user cannot view the Advisor dashboard.
Test Steps: 1. Without logging in, browse to the Advisor Dashboard URL.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected to Login. Fail if an unauthenticated user can view the Advisor dashboard.

Title: Non-Advisor Blocked from Advisor Dashboard
Objectives: Verify a non-advisor role cannot view the Advisor dashboard.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Student, Treasurer, Professor, or Admin.
Test Steps:
1. Log in as a non-advisor.
2. Browse to the Advisor Dashboard URL.
Expected Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Actual Results: Redirected to the user's own role dashboard.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if redirected away to the user's own dashboard. Fail if a non-advisor can view the Advisor dashboard.

Title: Overview KPI Cards Follow School-Year Dropdown
Objectives: Verify Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable update with the student-list school-year dropdown while Remaining Balance stays cumulative.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; data exists across multiple school years.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Overview.
2. Change the school-year dropdown above the student list.
Expected Results: Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable recompute for the selected year; Remaining Balance stays cumulative and does not change with the dropdown.
Actual Results: Total Collected, Total Expenses, and Collectable recompute for the selected year; Remaining Balance stays cumulative and does not change with the dropdown.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the three cards follow the dropdown and Remaining Balance stays cumulative. Fail otherwise.

Title: View Student List With Filters
Objectives: Verify the advisor can view the student list with the full filter set and reset it to default.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; students exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Overview.
2. Apply the course, year-level, payment-status, school-year, and search filters.
3. Click Default.
Test Data: q / course / year / status / school year
Expected Results: The student list displays and the filters narrow it correctly; Default clears the search and all filters and restores the full list.
Actual Results: The student list displays and the filters narrow it correctly; Default clears the search and all filters and restores the full list.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the filters and Default reset work. Fail if a filter or the reset does not work.

Title: View Org-Fee Receipt (Advisor)
Objectives: Verify the advisor can open a student's payment receipt, the same as the treasurer.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; a payment with a receipt exists.
Test Steps:
1. Open a student's ledger from the list.
2. Open the receipt for a payment.
Expected Results: The receipt is shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Actual Results: The receipt is shown (number, date, amount, status, semester, school year, student, issuer, and signature).
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the receipt displays with the issuer's signature. Fail if the receipt does not display.

Title: Advisor Reports Page (View-Only)
Objectives: Verify the advisor can open the Reports page and view the reports and details, with no create/edit/delete controls.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; reports exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Reports page.
2. Open a report's detail and Print it.
Expected Results: The reports list and detail (totals and included items) display and Print works; there is no New Report button and no delete/edit control.
Actual Results: The reports list and detail (totals and included items) display and Print works; there is no New Report button and no delete/edit control.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if reports are viewable and printable with no create/edit/delete controls. Fail if any write control appears or the detail/print fails.

Title: Advisor Transaction History (Read-Only)
Objectives: Verify the advisor can view the full transaction history with no edit or delete actions.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; transactions exist.
Test Steps:
1. Open the Transaction History page.
2. Inspect the Actions column and the filters/search.
Expected Results: All transactions (org fee, other funds, expenses) are listed with working filters and search; the Actions column has no edit or delete buttons.
Actual Results: All transactions (org fee, other funds, expenses) are listed with working filters and search; the Actions column has no edit or delete buttons.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the history is fully viewable and read-only. Fail if any edit or delete action is available to the advisor.

Title: Advisor Has No Record or Settings Actions
Objectives: Verify the advisor sidebar exposes only read-only pages and write endpoints reject the advisor role.
Test Steps:
1. Review the sidebar navigation.
2. Attempt a write action (e.g., record payment) via its endpoint.
Expected Results: The sidebar shows only Overview, Reports, Transaction History, and Profile (no Record Payment/Expense, no Settings); any write action is blocked by the role guard.
Actual Results: The sidebar shows only Overview, Reports, Transaction History, and Profile (no Record Payment/Expense, no Settings); any write action is blocked by the role guard.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the advisor has no write actions and write endpoints reject the role. Fail if any recording/settings action is available.

Title: Advisor Profile Page
Objectives: Verify the advisor can view their profile information.
Expected Results: The profile shows the advisor's avatar, name, role (Advisor), CTU ID, and email; personal fields are read-only with a notice to contact the SSG administrator.
Actual Results: The profile shows the advisor's avatar, name, role (Advisor), CTU ID, and email; personal fields are read-only with a notice to contact the SSG administrator.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the profile displays the advisor's details. Fail if the profile does not load or shows the wrong details.

Title: Advisor Update Own Avatar
Objectives: Verify the advisor can change their own profile photo.
Test Steps:
1. Open the profile.
2. Upload a valid image (JPG/PNG/WEBP, 2MB or smaller).
Expected Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile.
Actual Results: The avatar is updated and shown in the sidebar/profile.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if a valid image updates the avatar. Fail if a valid image does not update the avatar.

Title: Advisor Logout
Objectives: Verify the advisor can sign out.
Expected Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; advisor pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Actual Results: The session is cleared and the user is redirected to the login/home page; advisor pages are no longer accessible without logging in again.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the session ends and the user is logged out. Fail if the session persists or advisor pages stay accessible.

Title: Edit Own Email (Valid)
Objectives: Verify a advisor can change the email on their own profile to a valid, unused address.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a valid, unused email and click Save.
Expected Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Actual Results: Success: "Email updated successfully."; the new email is shown on the profile and saved to the account.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the email is updated and persisted. Fail if a valid, unused email is not saved.

Title: Edit Own Email (Invalid Format)
Objectives: Verify a malformed email address is rejected.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter a malformed address and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Actual Results: Error: "Please enter a valid email address."; the email is unchanged. (An empty value is rejected with "Email is required.")
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the malformed email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if an invalid email is accepted.

Title: Edit Own Email (Already in Use)
Objectives: Verify an email already belonging to another account is rejected.
Prerequisites: Logged in as Advisor; another account already uses the target email.
Test Steps:
1. Open the My Profile page.
2. Click Edit on the Email field.
3. Enter an email already used by another account and click Save.
Expected Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Actual Results: Error: "That email address is already in use by another account."; the email is unchanged.
Pass/Fail Criteria: Pass if the duplicate email is rejected and the email is unchanged. Fail if a duplicate email is accepted.
